channel.title: Photographies on Hollis Akins
channel.description: Recent content in Photographies on Hollis Akins

item.title: Perspectives
item.description: I worked as a Research Assistant at the Guilford College Cline Observatory in the summer of 2018, studying variable stars and constructing a system for automatic data analysis and collection. The project was intended primarily to facilitate future student research using the tools I developed. While the nature of the project did not necessitate a final research paper or presentation, I am compiling a summary of the work I did and the preliminary results obtained.
